reviews.review_msg: I agree with the last person. 409 was pretty much exactly the same as 260. Zita is a very nice prof though, always willing to help out. I'm very suprised someone rated her "hot".

For such interesting subject matter, not a very interesting course, which was disappointing. If you did 260, you've basically seen the highlights already. Also, McRobbie's explanations weren't always very clear.

socioling, an interesting course listening to his experience in doing research. mt is open bk and actually his 321 mt n final are open bk as well. so dont worry abut memorization. u just need to go over before exam, so that look them up fast on the exam.
boring lectures..  but you'll learn a bit..
